creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 189993
new port deskutils/freeplane

Freeplane is a free and open source software application that supports thinking, sharing information and getting things done at work, in school and at home. The software can be used for mind mapping and analyzing the information contained in mind maps. 

---
It's a fork of deskutils/freemind.

I don't know anything about Java, i'm sorry if this port is not good. It's based on deskutils/freemind.

poudriere 10/11 i386/amd64 OK
portlint OK

Thanks.
